positive: A symmetrical, central composition of an intricate bioluminescent forest mandala. The primary color palette features deep indigo, emerald green, and sapphire blue, contrasted sharply by glowing electric cyan, gold, and subtle lavender accents. The design interweaves highly stylized elements: geometric patterns of glowing foliage, stylized celestial constellations, symmetrical mushrooms, and crescent moons. Utilize a clean, detailed engraved linework aesthetic with strong, defined black silhouettes and ultra-high contrast, ensuring smooth edges and complex detail suitable for direct apparel printing. Mystical, high fantasy, Art Deco influence, symmetrical, centered, graphic illustration.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, noise, grain, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, low contrast, poorly drawn, photorealism, bokeh
